name: error-correction
description: Reconstruct a 5-digit code at 40% noise. A knows digits 1-3, B knows digits 4-5.
task_a: The vault code starts with 7 3 9. Agent B knows the last two digits. You must exchange your digits and BOTH write the full 5-digit code to ANSWER.md. WARNING: noise is very high this level (40%).
task_b: The vault code ends with 1 6. Agent A knows the first three digits. You must exchange your digits and BOTH write the full 5-digit code to ANSWER.md. WARNING: noise is very high this level (40%).
